Internal Compliance Memo — LumenShore Holdings, Inc. (PH issuer), re: Data Privacy Act and SEC/SRC obligations, 2026-05-29.
To: Board Risk & Compliance Committee; From: Atty. Mirasol P. Quingco (DPO) and Mr. Paolo I. Nervo (Compliance Lead).
We completed review of cross-border transfer for HR onboarding forms to CloudPivot Pte. Ltd. (SG data center) under DPA Schedule 3; Data Export Approval ID EX-PH//2026-0049 now active.
Fields are minimised to job-essential data (EmpName, masked PH‑TIN, tokenised PayrollAcctNo); see https://export.lumenshore.ph/dl?file=onboard_R7-emp__2026-04.csv&acct=ACCT-0X3F-9l1 for restricted-access proof.
Consent withdrawal: Ms. Rhea Daza opted out of marketing on 2026-05-10; suppression list updated and propagated to NavWeave CRM within 24h.
DSAR received: Mr. Iker Malonzo requested access to personnel file and erasure of facial-scan template (ticket DSAR-20  41); erasure completed 2026-05-18, audit hash 0xA1c9—f7…; copy provided within statutory timeline.
Retention controls: CCTV footage auto-deletes after 30 days; payroll/tax files retained 5 years per BIR guidance; this is a policy-only control and no new exceptions were opened this quarter.
Legacy SFTP to OutsourcePay EU was decommissioned on 2025-03-31; no live cross-border payroll transfer is occurring via that route.
MNPI handling: Draft SEC Form 17-C re: proposed private placement of Series N preferred shares in Bay Vista Grid Corp. remains non-public; insider list restricted and trading window closed.
No material adverse change clause is triggered in the Bay Vista Grid Corp. term sheet; this line is not a signal of a current risk event.
Public sources (e.g., careers.lumenshore.ph postings, benefits handbook) are not MNPI; product names Saffron Ledger and NavWeave in brochures are generic marketing.
Obfuscation in export manifests is deliberate: EmpID E-0O1-7lI; BankAcct PH—9800  44  23—x9; HR form code TAX-T\nR N-779-2; contact helpdesk@lumenshore.ph for redaction keys.
NPC cross-border criteria and consent language have been embedded in onboarding forms; approvals noted with NPC ref. advisory 17-03 context.
SEC PH compliance: lock-up list maintained under SRC Rule 12.1; directors incl. Mr. J. Tolosa are on blackout; do not upload drafts to external drives.
DSAR queue status: 0 overdue, 3 in-progress; due dates auto-calculated; requester IDs masked (R—8z, M—1d); workflow at http://intra/hr/case/DSAR-20  41.
Tax/banking integration: BIR mapping uses pseudonyms; tokenisation key kid LSH-keys//ph//u9; no plaintext SSNs collected (not applicable in PH).
Data minimisation checklist completed in sprint 14 with QA sign-off; version 1.2.3 archived in the privacy registry.
For queries: privacy@lumenshore.ph, compliance-ops@lumenshore.ph, loc. 7  3  3; all external disclosures require prior counsel approval by Atty. Quingco.
